body:
## Rationale

MetalForge has 24 `/llms/vs/<slug>.md` files covering the top comparison pairs (shipped via #1276). The sitemap generates all 1,891 drummer comparison pairs dynamically ‚Äî but AI crawlers can only cite pairs that have LLM markdown files.

Adding 8 more high-value pairs expands the comparison AI citation surface for the most-searched matchups not yet covered.

## 8 Proposed New Pairs

| Slug | Why High Value |
|------|----------------|
| `tomas-haake-vs-george-kollias` | Precision vs speed debate; both in top GSC queries |
| `brann-dailor-vs-danny-carey` | Prog metal titans; Mastodon vs Tool ‚Äî huge fan interest |
| `pete-sandoval-vs-flo-mounier` | Blast beat originators ‚Äî death/grind comparison |
| `mike-portnoy-vs-mike-mangini` | Dream Theater era debate ‚Äî highest-trafficked DT question |
| `lars-ulrich-vs-charlie-benante` | Big 4 rivalry; thrash drumming canon comparison |
| `vinnie-paul-vs-dave-lombardo` | Groove metal vs thrash metal; two legends |
| `travis-orbin-vs-matt-halpern` | Djent/Periphery era head-to-head; djent fans search this |
| `pete-sandoval-vs-george-kollias` | Blast beat speed record holders head-to-head |

**Dedup:** All 8 slugs confirmed absent from `public/llms/vs/` directory.

## Format

Each file mirrors existing pattern (e.g. `public/llms/vs/lars-ulrich-vs-dave-lombardo.md`):
```markdown
# [Drummer A] vs [Drummer B] ‚Äî Drum Kit & Gear Comparison | MetalForge

## At a Glance
| Spec | [Drummer A] | [Drummer B] |
|------|------------|------------|
| Drums | ... | ... |
| Cymbals | ... | ... |
| Pedals | ... | ... |

## Gear Deep Dive
### [Drummer A] Setup...
### [Drummer B] Setup...

## Style & Technique Comparison
...

## FAQ
**Q: Who is the better drummer, [A] or [B]?**
**Q: What gear does [A] use vs [B]?**
**Q: How do [A]'s cymbals compare to [B]'s?**

## See Also
- [Drummer A Profile](https://metalforge.io/drummer/...)
- [Drummer B Profile](https://metalforge.io/drummer/...)
```

## Files to create (8 files)

```
public/llms/vs/tomas-haake-vs-george-kollias.md
public/llms/vs/brann-dailor-vs-danny-carey.md
public/llms/vs/pete-sandoval-vs-flo-mounier.md
public/llms/vs/mike-portnoy-vs-mike-mangini.md
public/llms/vs/lars-ulrich-vs-charlie-benante.md
public/llms/vs/vinnie-paul-vs-dave-lombardo.md
public/llms/vs/travis-orbin-vs-matt-halpern.md
public/llms/vs/pete-sandoval-vs-george-kollias.md
```

## Sitemap

Each new file also needs a corresponding entry in the LLM sitemap block of `api/sitemap.js`. The current sitemap hardcodes the 24 existing vs slugs. Either:
- Extend the hardcoded list, OR
- Make the sitemap derive from actual files in `public/llms/vs/` directory

## Quality gate per file

- ‚â•300 words
- Gear comparison table
- 3 FAQ Q&A
- 2+ internal links to drummer profiles

## Verify

1. `ls public/llms/vs/ | wc -l` ‚Äî should be 32 (was 24)
2. `curl https://metalforge.io/sitemap.xml | grep 'llms/vs/tomas-haake'` ‚Äî appears in sitemap
3. `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/vs/tomas-haake-vs-george-kollias.md` ‚Äî returns 200

## Done

- [ ] 8 new /llms/vs/<slug>.md files created
- [ ] sitemap.js updated with 8 new LLM vs entries
- [ ] Each file: ‚â•300 words, gear table, 3 FAQ, internal links
title: SEO batch: /llms/vs/ expansion ‚Äî 8 more high-value drummer comparison LLM pairs (~8 files)
